headline: Uber (UBER) Faces Shareholder Lawsuit Over Alleged Safety And Compliance Failures
summary: Shareholders have filed a new lawsuit against Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) targeting the company’s board and senior management. The claim argues Uber is a “serial compliance offender” that put growth ahead of rider safety and regulatory obligations. Investors are seeking financial accountability from leaders, stronger board oversight, and tighter safety and compliance controls. Uber Technologies operates a global ride hailing and delivery platform, placing it at the center of ongoing...

headline: Uber Down 29% From Its High. Earnings Up 40%. Wall Street Sees 47% Upside
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) at $70.91 sits in a holding pattern. headline: Zazzle Names Brian Yick Chief Strategy Officer
summary: MENLO PARK, Calif., June 23, 2026--Zazzle, the platform where ideas become real things that create lasting moments, today announced that Brian Yick has joined the company as Chief Strategy Officer. In the role, Yick will lead business and corporate development and help drive the company's growth as a technology platform.

headline: Regula Helps Uber Build a Nationwide Driver Verification Network in Poland
summary: RESTON, Va., June 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regula is helping Uber bring advanced driver verification technologies to more cities across Poland. By expanding the use of Regula’s document authentication solutions nationwide, Uber is strengthening fraud prevention and adding an extra layer of high-assurance identity checks that goes beyond standard industry practices.
